source: Exhibit D (Franchise Agreement, pp 185-243), Exhibit C3 (Development Agreement, pp 162-184), Exhibit E1 (Guaranty, pp 244-253), Exhibit H (Lease, pp 290-323), plus Item 17 tables

fee_and_payment.royalty: 5% of Gross Sales, weekly via EFT
fee_and_payment.advertising_contribution: 4.6%-5.0% of Gross Sales, weekly via EFT
fee_and_payment.rent: If PLK property: base rent + percentage rent (8.5% up to $133K/mo, 10% above)

site_and_construction.site_selection: Franchisee selects, PLK approves. Must submit Site Package with site plan, floor plan, elevations
site_and_construction.construction_plans: PLK provides standard plans in PDF/AutoCAD; franchisee hires architect for site-specific design
site_and_construction.approval_required: Written approval for all plans, modifications, and deviations

training_and_operations.ptp_required: 5 managers (first restaurant) or 3-4 (additional); 115 hours over 6 weeks
training_and_operations.managing_director: Full-time devotion, nearby residence, cannot own/operate competing chicken business
training_and_operations.manual_compliance: Must comply with all Manual revisions; PLK can modify at any time
training_and_operations.financial_reporting: Monthly P&L, quarterly unaudited financial statement

termination.curable_defaults: 30 days to cure (10 days for non-payment)
noncurable_defaults: Insolvency/bankruptcy (may not be enforceable under Title 11)
Failure to close after verbal notice for health/safety violation
termination.post_termination: Complete de-identification, return manuals/records, pay all amounts due, assign/transfer lease to PLK, comply with noncompete, return all confidential information

transfer.rofr: PLK can match any bona fide offer
transfer.convenience_entity_transfer: No transfer fee if 100% owned entity formed for convenience

cross_default.description: Default under Development Agreement (other than development schedule) is a non-curable default under Franchise Agreement. Default under any PLK affiliate agreement is grounds for termination.

noncompete.during_term: Cannot own/operate QSR specializing in chicken
noncompete.geographic: Within 10 miles of any Popeyes Restaurant owned

guaranty.scope: Joint and several guarantee of all payment and performance obligations
guaranty.who_must_guarantee: Officers, directors, and all holders of 10%+ legal or beneficial interests
guaranty.spousal_guarantee: Not specifically required in FDD text

liquidated_damages.development_agreement: If terminated before expiration, PLK retains all prepaid franchise fees plus franchisee must pay next installment as liquidated damages

venue_and_dispute.venue: S.D. Florida or 11th Judicial Court in Miami-Dade County, FL

insurance.general_liability: $5,000,000 per occurrence (bodily injury, death, property damage)
insurance.employers_liability: $1,000,000 bodily injury by accident and disease
insurance.higher_limits: Required if mandated by law, landlord, or PLK headlease

indemnification.franchisee_indemnifies_plk: For costs and any judgment if PLK sued for claims relating to restaurant operation or arising from agreements
indemnification.franchisee_pays_enforcement_costs: If franchisee defaults or sues PLK (unless franchisee found in compliance)

force_majeure.disclosed: Not specifically addressed in Item 17 tables
force_majeure.note: May exist in full Franchise Agreement text — not surfaced in Item 17 summary

distinctive_clauses.description: Prohibited from using confidential information for machine learning, AI model training, or generative AI input without prior approval
Restaurant operations must score in top 50% of peer category; grade D or F in any metric is non-curable default
Mandatory for new franchisees; advertising contribution may escalate from 5.0% to 5.50% based on EBITDA tests
$1,000/yr per restaurant via in-restaurant fundraising or donation
